comments.author: backlog
comments.text: User requirement: `/ralph configure` must not be a narrow tools/agents screen. It is the complete Ralph-state configuration surface. It should start with available/active tools, available/enabled agents, maxIterations, itemsPerIteration, reflectEvery, reflectInstructions, execution profile, and sandbox, and it should automatically stay aligned with tau-o6hb's configurable-field inventory.
